frame_eqs_str: a['wave_r']=(0.5+div(Math.sin(div(a['time'],3)),2)); a['wave_b']=(0.5+(0.5*Math.sin((a['time']*47)))); a['wave_g']=(0.65+div(Math.sin((a['time']*0.23)),10)); a['dx']=(a['dx']-0.0005); a['dy']=(a['dy']-0.0005); a['bass_effect']=Math.max(0, (Math.max(a['bass_att'], a['bass'])-1)); a['treb_effect']=Math.max(0, (Math.max(a['treb_att'], a['treb'])-1)); a['wave_mystery']=div(a['time'],10); a['ob_size']=div(Math.sin((a['time']*5)),100); a['ob_r']=(1-a['wave_r']); a['ob_g']=(1-a['wave_g']); a['ob_b']=(1-a['wave_b']); a['ib_size']=div(Math.sin((a['time']*2)),100); a['ib_r']=(0.75+(0.25*Math.sin((a['time']*0.4)))); a['ib_g']=(0.25+(0.25*Math.cos((a['time']*0.87)))); a['ib_b']=(0.5+(0.5*Math.sin((1.23*a['time'])))); a['wave_x']=(0.5+div(Math.sin((2*a['time'])),8)); a['wave_y']=(0.5-div(Math.cos((3*a['time'])),6));
